title: Buce's Pig Armor
description: Adds iron armor to saddled pigs.
body:
Adds iron armor to saddled pigs.

![Pig Armor](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/HtOUhFGK/images/3a338cb2f991d29db46bc9ea63e64fa498b04274.png)

When installed as a resource pack, saddled pigs have an iron helmet and boots as shown above. When installed as a data pack, saddling a pig gives it 4 armor defense points (the same amount that an iron helmet and boots provide to players).
